mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms ( user_uuid, category_no, room_title, max_users, now_users, room_password, room_notice, room_private, camera_status, mic_status, room_thumbnail, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{categoryNo}, #{roomTitle}, #{maxUsers}, #{nowUsers}, #{roomPassword}, #{roomNotice}, #{roomPrivate}, #{cameraStatus}, #{micStatus}, #{roomThumbnail}, #{expiredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT room_no, user_uuid, category_no, room_title, max_users, now_users, room_password, room_notice, room_private, room_premium, room_thumbnail, created_at, updated_at, expired_at FROM rooms WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}

SELECT r.room_no AS roomNo, r.room_title AS roomTitle, r.room_notice AS roomNotice, r.room_thumbnail AS roomThumbnail, r.category_no AS categoryNo, c.category_name AS categoryName, r.now_users AS currentUsers, r.max_users AS maxUsers, r.room_private AS roomPrivate,
CASE WHEN r.user_uuid = #{userUuid} THEN r.room_password ELSE NULL END AS roomPassword,
CASE WHEN r.user_uuid = #{userUuid} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS owner,
CASE WHEN r.expired_at IS NOT NULL AND r.expired_at < NOW() THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS expired, r.camera_status AS cameraStatus, r.mic_status AS micStatus, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.expired_at AS expiredAt FROM rooms r LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no WHERE r.room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET room_title = #{req.roomTitle}, max_users = #{req.maxUsers}, category_no = #{req.categoryNo}, expired_at = #{req.expiredAt}, camera_status = #{req.cameraStatus}, mic_status = #{req.micStatus}, room_notice = #{req.roomNotice}, room_thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
UPDATE rooms SET room_notice = #{roomNotice}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.select: SELECT rp.part_no AS "partNo", rp.user_uuid AS "userUuid", rp.camera_stauts AS "cameraStauts" rp.mic_status AS "micStatus" r.user_name AS "userName" r.useremail AS "userName" u.user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage" FROM room_paricipants rp INNER JOIN users u ON rp.user_uuid = u.user_uuid WHERE rp.room_no = #{roomNo}
